subtasks.description: Query Q4 2024 seat licensing data (active seats, product, cost) and calculate average cost per active seat by product, sorted descending

plan.cost_rationale: Single SQL query to aggregate licensing metrics by product. No multi-source reconciliation needed. Standard grouping, aggregation, and sorting operations make this suitable for the small tier—the logic is straightforward even if the underlying table schema is complex, as sql_gen will handle the JOIN/WHERE clauses needed to isolate Q4 2024 data and active seats."

output.sql: SELECT product, SUM(amount_usd) / NULLIF(SUM(daily_active_seats), 0) AS avg_cost_per_seat FROM consumption_facts WHERE event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY product ORDER BY avg_cost_per_seat DESC
